name: Pla Kapong Kimao (Deep Fried Fish with Garlic Sauce )
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup coarsely chopped green prik chi fa (Thai bird's eye chili)
1/4 cup coarsely chopped red prik chi fa (Thai bird's eye chili)
1/4 cup thinly sliced green onions (scallions/spring onions)
1/4 cup chopped coriander (cilantro), including roots if possible
6 kaffir lime leaves, torn (or about a teaspoon of lime zest)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the fish and leave the head on. Weigh approximately one pound.
2. Slash the sides of the fish.
3. Dredge or coat the fish lightly in flour or batter.
4. Deep fry the fish in hot oil for about five minutes per side until golden brown.
5. Remove the fish to a large plate or serving platter.
6. Prepare the sauce by heating oil in a medium skillet over medium heat.
7. Add all sauce ingredients and stir continuously for about 3 minutes.
8. Stir in lime leaves and basil, then cook for an additional 2 minutes.
9. Pour the sauce over the fried fish to serve.
Special thanks to - Muoi Khuntilanont.
